text_original: Solid app overall. Only thing keeping it at four is the need to reestablish who I am in every chat. Would like the option to have a "character profile" that I could choose to bring into a new chat.
text_zh: 总体来说是一款很棒的 App。唯一让它停留在四星的原因是，每次对话都需要重新建立我的身份。希望能有一个“角色档案”选项，让我可以选择将其带入新的对话中。
reply_original:
Thanks for the solid 4-star review! I have great news: we actually have a "Mask" feature designed for this. Inside any chat, tap the [+] icon next to the text box to find "Mask." You can fill in your name and profile there to help the AI remember you!

If it still forgets, please email support@fantachat.ai. We'd love to help!
reply_zh:
感谢你的 4 星好评！我有一个好消息：我们其实有一个专门为此设计的“面具”功能。在任何对话中，点击文本框旁边的 [+] 图标即可找到“面具”。你可以在那里填写你的姓名和个人资料，以帮助 AI 记住你！

如果它仍然会忘记，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。我们很乐意提供帮助！
